title: Lapis Lazuli (Part 1)
overview: Shiloh wakes up again from a dream in which he is instructed to help the people of the world make choices.

title: Lapis Lazuli (Part 2)
overview: Shiloh finds Pearl, but now it’s Elazul who is on his own.

title: Ruby
overview: Shiloh and Detective Boyd travel to Ghatt Village, where they hope to get some information about Sandra, the Jewel Reaper.

title: Sapphire
overview: Jewel Hunter Sandra issued a warning that she would be stealing the Blue Eye. Shiloh and Boyd investigate.

title: White Pearl
overview: Shiloh is carried home by Seraphina after his encounter with Sandra. When he comes to, he continues looking for ways to help the Jumi.

title: Esmeralda
overview: Seraphina and her friend, Esmeralda, are learning to use magic. Esmeralda isn't as much of a natural as Seraphina, but that's only the beginning of her worries.

title: Diamond
overview: The gang is looking for the last of Esmeralda's sisters' cores. They encounter Valerie, one of Shiloh's friends. She may know where the core is.

title: Blackpearl
overview: Things become tense between Elazul and Shiloh when Esmeralda’s core is stolen by Seraphina. Pearl is missing, and they are concerned that she could be next.

title: Alexandrite
overview: Sandra and Seraphina asks the Lord of Jewels to produce a teardrop crystal, but they realize they don’t have enough Jumi cores yet.

title: Fluorite
overview: Shiloh, Pearl, Seraphina and Elazul speak with Diana, who reveals details about the Jumi's past. What they learn casts doubt on their decisions.

title: Teardrop Crystal (Part 1)
overview: Lady Blackpearl reveals many things about the Jumi’s history, including Sandra’s murky past.

title: Teardrop Crystal (Part 2)
overview: Sandra finally reveals what her plans are, although a certain discovery will surprise Shiloh.
